_comment: StarMade egg for Pelican / Pterodactyl. Generated from egg-src/ by build-egg.sh — do not hand-edit egg/egg-starmade.json; edit egg-src/ and rebuild.
name: StarMade
author: garretreichenbach@gmail.com
description: StarMade dedicated server. Downloads the current build straight from the official CDN (release/dev/pre/archive branches, any version) and launches it with the correct StarLoader agent + module-open JVM arguments for modern (Java 21) builds. Server settings are driven from panel variables via server.cfg.

variables.name: Update Branch
variables.description: Which StarMade release channel to install from: release, dev, pre, or archive.

variables.name: Version
variables.description: Specific StarMade version to install (e.g. 0.304.7), or 'latest' for the newest build on the chosen branch. Invalid versions fall back to latest. Applied on (re)install and, if AUTO_UPDATE is on, at each boot.

variables.name: Auto-update on boot
variables.description: When enabled (1), re-pull the latest build for the chosen branch every time the server starts. Leave off (0) to keep a fixed version until you reinstall.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Public/display name on the server list (server.cfg SERVER_LIST_NAME, max 64 chars).

variables.name: Server Description
variables.description: Description on the server list (server.cfg SERVER_LIST_DESCRIPTION, max 128 chars). Blank keeps the default.

variables.name: Announce Hostname
variables.description: Public hostname/IP clients use to reach this server (server.cfg HOST_NAME_TO_ANNOUNCE_TO_SERVER_LIST). REQUIRED for 'Announce to Server List' to work — e.g. play.example.com.

variables.name: Announce to Server List
variables.description: List this server publicly on the StarMade server list (server.cfg ANNOUNCE_SERVER_TO_SERVERLIST).

variables.name: Require StarMade Authentication
variables.description: Require authenticated accounts to join (needs Use Authentication on) — server.cfg REQUIRE_STARMADE_AUTHENTICATION.

variables.name: Use Whitelist
variables.description: Only allow players listed in whitelist.txt (server.cfg USE_WHITELIST).

variables.name: Super Admin Password
variables.description: Password for remote super-admin commands. Leave blank to disable (server.cfg SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD / SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD_USE). The in-container console (this panel) is always admin regardless of this value.

variables.name: Heap Headroom (MB)
variables.description: Memory (MB) held back from the server's allocation for the JVM's off-heap/direct memory, so -Xmx = SERVER_MEMORY - headroom. Prevents OOM kills; raise if the container is killed under load.

variables.name: Extra JVM Arguments
variables.description: Additional JVM arguments appended to the launch command (e.g. -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxDirectMemorySize=2G). Space-separated.
